note: C-37/C-26 attested provenance chain. Every SHIPPED production component (what GitHub Pages serves) is listed with its content hash and the chain that produced it: the frozen specification it derives from, the policy bundle that gated it, the test evidence, the adversarial-verification result, and the NAMED OWNING ROLE answerable for it. verify/tests/61-provenance verifies (a) every shipped file is listed, (b) each hash matches the file on disk (a silent change to a shipped component breaks the chain and fails the build), and (c) the chain fields are non-empty. This is git-anchored and machine-reconstructible on demand. RESIDUAL (R-LEDGER, honest): the model+prompt-hash per commit is NOT cryptographically signed here; git history + this manifest are the append-only substitute. Full Runner-only signed provenance is the buildable upgrade. | v2.1 (compiled-ahead): served set is index.html + compiled ./*.js + self-hosted ./vendor/* ; the .jsx are attested SOURCE, and 66-compiled-fresh proves compiled==source. | v2.2 (module migration): sources under src/ (data as JSON, esbuild bundle); .jsx removed; data hash unchanged.
policy_bundle_version: verify/ @ catalogue v2.0 (run.js + mutation.js + gate.js + tests/)

components.role: served page shell (self-hosted vendors + SRI, loads compiled ./*.js — no unpkg, no in-browser Babel)
components.derives_from_spec: CLAUDE.md architecture section + DR-002 (CI gate) + Pinned CDN versions section
components.test_evidence: verify/tests/35-supply-chain (pin manifest), verify/tests/40-sri (integrity recompute), verify/tests/30-static-security (hardened links, http-only-localhost/w3.org)
components.adversarial_verification: frozen acceptance suite (35/0 against the modularized bundle) + Track C seeds

components.role: served self-contained iOS JS-Widget (WidgetWeb spec) — stateless; gated ?status-api fetch to the constructed API_BASE only; no cookies/localStorage/vendors
components.derives_from_spec: DR-008 (widget served from Pages) + INTEGRATION_NOTES (gating) + github.com/Villy21/JsWidget spec
components.test_evidence: verify/tests/62-security-surface (in SERVED: gated fetch, no cookie/localStorage/telemetry/AI-client), 61-provenance (this hash)
components.adversarial_verification: driven end-to-end at the iOS widget sizes (sample + live map); frozen acceptance unaffected (widget not in the atlas suite)

reconstruction_control: verify/tests/61-provenance reconstructs the chain for every shipped component on every build and fails loudly if a component is unlisted or its hash drifted; the git history supplies which commit/model authored each change. A scheduled spot-reconstruction is the standing cadence (governance/mandate cadence table).
